description:
Modern web radio player built with Tauri and React

Radioss is a modern, cross-platform web radio player application built with Tauri and React.
It provides a clean, intuitive interface for browsing and listening to internet radio stations.
What's Changed
- feat: improved country search by @DasCanard in #24
- feat: minimize to tray by @DasCanard in #25
Full Changelog: v0.5.2...v0.6.0
